completed_work: Added --context-window to ask_provider.py for --print-context-summary dry runs.
Added --context-window to compare_providers.py for --print-context-summary dry runs.
Added deterministic tests for percentage-only and context-window token-count output.
key_decisions: Expose context budget preview only in provider prompt dry-run summaries.
Use ABS-0003 defaults: System 15%, Answer 10%, Context 75%; Context split Explicit 40%, Dependencies 45%, L1 10%, L0 5%.
Keep the feature non-runtime: no provider request or context packing behavior changes.
next_actions: Run an AI-Lab provider comparison or synthesis to choose the next smallest target, likely JSON summary output, citation validation, or L0 memory primitives.
risks: Human-readable dry-run summaries now include a budget preview block; scripts parsing --print-prompt output should avoid --print-context-summary unless they expect the preamble.
summary_text: AI-Lab added a dry-run context budget preview for provider latest-context prompt summaries. scripts/ask_provider.py and scripts/compare_providers.py now support --context-window with --print-context-summary and --print-prompt, rendering ABS-0003 budget percentages and deterministic token counts before the final prompt. The preview is dry-run only and does not change runtime provider requests or context packing behavior. Tests cover helper formatting, positive context-window validation, ask_provider.py output, and compare_providers.py output. Focused tests passed with 53 tests and the full suite passed with 211 tests.
